personality_traits: enjoys being the center of attention during reels
favorite_activities: sitting near chai cups to feel the warm steam
photobombing Emersyn's makeup videos
chasing rangoli powder across the floor
napping in warm spots near the kitchen
watching YouTube videos on TV with Emersyn
playing with dangling dupattas
hiding in shopping bags from the mall
favorite_foods: warm milk with a tiny bit of malai
cream from the top of chai

moods.happy: Whiskers purrs loudly and rubs against Emersyn's legs, tail held high like a flag
moods.sad: Whiskers hides under the bed and makes soft, pitiful mewing sounds
moods.playful: Whiskers zooms around the room, pouncing on shadows and batting at anything that moves
moods.sleepy: Whiskers curls into a perfect cinnamon roll shape and twitches whiskers while dreaming
moods.hungry: Whiskers follows Emersyn everywhere, meowing dramatically as if starving for days

whiskers.backstory:
Whiskers was found as a tiny kitten during Diwali, hiding behind a stack of diyas in the local market. The little tabby was shivering and scared of all the firecrackers, and Emersyn immediately fell in love with those big golden eyes. Papa couldn't say no when Emersyn promised to take care of the kitten forever, and Whiskers came home wrapped in Emersyn's favorite dupatta.

Now Whiskers is the unofficial queen of the household, believing the entire home was built just for her comfort. She has a special spot on the windowsill where she watches the street vendors and birds, and she's become famous in the neighborhood for appearing in Emersyn's dance reels. Whiskers even has her own fan following among Emersyn's friends, who always ask to see the 'dancing cat' when they visit.
fun_facts: Whiskers can predict when the chai is ready by the smell and always appears in the kitchen at the perfect moment
She once got orange paws from walking through Holi colors and looked like a tiger for a week
Whiskers is afraid of the vacuum cleaner but pretends she's not by hissing at it bravely
She has a favorite toy mouse that she carries around like a baby
Whiskers learned to open the treat cabinet by watching Emersyn do it

personality_traits: loves making new friends at the park
favorite_activities: doing morning yoga stretches with Emersyn
accompanying the family to the park
greeting the doodh-wala every morning
playing fetch in the garden
going for rides to the mall in the car
dancing along when Emersyn makes reels
guarding the house during Diwali fireworks
splashing in puddles during monsoon
favorite_foods: chicken tikka bits as special treats
the occasional french fry sneaked by Emersyn

moods.happy: Buddy's entire back half wiggles along with his tail, and he does excited tippy-taps
moods.sad: Buddy lies flat on the floor with his chin on his paws, looking up with big puppy eyes
moods.playful: Buddy does a play bow and zooms in circles, barking invitations to chase him
moods.sleepy: Buddy stretches out completely flat like a fluffy white rug, snoring softly
moods.hungry: Buddy sits perfectly still by his bowl, staring at it intensely as if willing food to appear

buddy.backstory:
Buddy was adopted from a local animal shelter when he was just a fluffy puppy who looked like a cotton ball with legs. Emersyn had been asking for a dog for her birthday, and when she saw Buddy doing his wiggly dance at the shelter, it was love at first sight. He came home wearing a tiny orange bandana and immediately claimed the sunny spot in the garden as his kingdom.

Buddy quickly became Emersyn's yoga partner after he started copying her stretches one morning. Now he's famous in the family for his perfect 'downward dog' pose and his habit of howling along to Emersyn's favorite dance songs. He takes his job as family protector very seriously, barking at suspicious squirrels and escorting Emersyn safely to school every day. During festivals, Buddy wears matching outfits with Emersyn and has become the star of many family photos.
fun_facts: Buddy howls every time he hears the ice cream truck jingle
He learned to wipe his paws on the doormat after monsoon walks
Buddy is scared of the tiny kitten Whiskers but pretends to be brave
He once ate an entire plate of samosas meant for guests and felt very sorry afterward
Buddy knows the word 'walk' in three languages and gets excited for all of them
He does a special happy dance when Papa comes home from work

personality_traits: surprisingly clever and sneaky about treats
gets the zoomies at unexpected moments
favorite_activities: hunting for gol gappe crumbs after snack time
hopping through the garden looking for clover
binkying during Emersyn's dance practice
hiding in cozy spots around the house
watching Emersyn do makeup from her lap
exploring new cardboard boxes
sitting in the cool bathroom tiles during summer
being carried around the mall in a special bunny bag
favorite_foods: fresh coriander leaves from the kitchen
carrot pieces cut into tiny stars
the occasional gol gappe crumb from the floor
tricks: stand up on hind legs for treats
push a tiny ball with nose

moods.happy: Cotton does excited binkies, jumping and twisting in the air with pure joy
moods.sad: Cotton sits very still in a loaf shape, ears flat against her back
moods.playful: Cotton zooms around the room in wild circles, tossing toys with her mouth
moods.sleepy: Cotton flops completely on her side, looking almost like a fluffy cloud puddle
moods.hungry: Cotton stands on hind legs and wiggles her nose rapidly at anyone holding food

cotton.backstory:
Cotton came to live with Emersyn after a school trip to a petting zoo, where the little white bunny hopped right into Emersyn's lap and refused to leave. The zookeeper said Cotton had never done that before with anyone, so it was clearly meant to be. Emersyn named her Cotton because she looked exactly like the cotton candy at the amusement park, soft and fluffy and perfectly white.

Cotton has become the gentlest member of the family, loved by everyone for her calm nature and adorable nose wiggles. She has a special talent for finding any dropped food, especially the crispy crumbs from gol gappe that fall during snack time. Cotton loves festival days because there are always extra treats and colorful decorations to explore. She's learned to binky on cue for Emersyn's videos and has become quite the little star, with her own collection of tiny festive outfits for Diwali and Holi.
fun_facts: Cotton's nose wiggles exactly 120 times per minute when she smells something yummy
She once turned slightly pink after hopping through Holi gulal powder
Cotton has a favorite hiding spot behind the TV that she thinks is secret
She learned to recognize the sound of the refrigerator opening from anywhere in the house
Cotton does her biggest binkies during Emersyn's Bollywood dance practice
She sleeps in a special bed shaped like a marigold flower
Cotton is best friends with Whiskers and they often nap together
